name: Metairie Bank & Trust Company
description_short: Metairie Bank & Trust Company is a full-service regional bank in Louisiana offering personal and business banking, lending, investments, and insurance services through multiple channels.
description_long:
Metairie Bank & Trust Company operates as a traditional community bank based in Metairie, Louisiana, serving both personal and business customers. The bank has established itself as a relationship-focused institution emphasizing personal service, as indicated by their tagline "The Bank of Personal Service."

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of financial products across personal and business segments. Personal services include multiple checking account tiers (Simply Free, Direct Interest, 50+, Elite Interest, and Teen Checking), savings products (Statement Savings, Money Market, CDs, Christmas Club), retirement accounts, home mortgage lending (including construction loans, purchase-with-renovation, HELOCs, and reverse mortgages), personal loans, auto loans, and recreational loans. Business services encompass commercial checking and savings accounts, business credit and debit cards, merchant services, ACH services, business term loans, commercial real estate loans, and commercial construction loans. The bank also operates MB Investments for investment management and MB Insurance Agency.

Metairie Bank distinguishes itself through specialized loan products like HELOCs and reverse mortgages, a dedicated investment management division, and integrated insurance services. They offer modern digital banking including mobile app functionality with Mobile Xpress Deposit, online bill payment, Zelle integration, and a credit score and financial insights feature within their mobile application. The bank actively communicates security awareness, including recent alerts about phishing attempts involving wire transfers and ACH activity.

As a traditional regional bank, Metairie Bank serves customers seeking in-person relationship banking combined with digital convenience. However, as a community bank, they likely have more limited geographic reach and product customization compared to national institutions. The website shows active operations with scheduled events and branch management activities, indicating operational stability. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Multiple personal checking accounts (Simply Free, Direct Interest, 50+ Interest, Elite Interest, Teen Checking)
Personal savings products (Statement Savings, Money Market, CDs, Christmas Club, Minor Savings Accounts)
Home mortgage lending including purchase, construction, renovation, HELOC, and reverse mortgages
Personal loans and lines of credit
Business checking and savings accounts with tiered options
Business term loans and commercial real estate loans
Commercial construction loans with dedicated commercial lenders
Investment management and financial planning through MB Investments
Insurance products through MB Insurance Agency
Digital banking including mobile app, online bill payment, Mobile Xpress Deposit, and Zelle
pros: Multiple specialized loan products including HELOCs, reverse mortgages, construction loans, and recreational loans not commonly bundled at smaller institutions
Integrated investment management through MB Investments with professional asset management and financial planning services
Tiered checking account options across personal segments (50+ accounts, Elite accounts, Teen accounts) showing attention to diverse customer needs
In-house insurance agency (MB Insurance Agency) allowing bundled financial and insurance services
Modern digital banking including mobile deposit, Zelle integration, online bill payment, and credit monitoring within mobile app
Active fraud and security awareness communications with specific phishing alerts to customers
Commercial-focused solutions including Commercial Capture Xpress, merchant services, and specialized business lending with dedicated commercial lenders
cons: Limited geographic presence as a regional Louisiana bank compared to national competitors, affecting accessibility for non-local customers
Website does not display specific APR ranges, fee structures, or interest rates for any products, requiring customers to contact bank directly for pricing
No mention of account minimum balance requirements, overdraft fees, or other standard banking costs on the publicly available website
Recent phishing and fraud alerts suggest the institution may be experiencing targeted security threats, though they are communicating about them
Website navigation is complex with multiple menu layers, potentially creating friction for new customers seeking specific product information
best_for: Louisiana-based personal customers seeking relationship banking with modern digital convenience and diverse account options
Small to mid-sized business owners in the region needing integrated banking, lending, and merchant services
Homeowners interested in HELOCs or reverse mortgages who prefer working with a relationship-focused local bank
Customers seeking bundled financial services including banking, investments, and insurance from a single institution
diagnosis: Metairie Bank is best for Louisiana-based customers and businesses seeking comprehensive financial services from a relationship-oriented regional bank that combines traditional in-person banking with modern digital tools. The primary caveat is limited geographic reach outside Louisiana and lack of transparent pricing information on their website, requiring direct customer contact to understand specific rates and fees.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Metairie Bank & Trust Company is a regional bank in Louisiana offering personal and business banking, lending, investments, and insurance services.
